title: Indus Gaming Modpack - Lite
description: Indus Gaming's top picks for realistic city building in Minecraft!
body:
**Indus Gaming Modpack – Lite** is the streamlined edition of the official modpack used in the _Indus Metropolis_ YouTube series. Built for players who want a realistic city-building experience without the full weight of the main pack, Lite focuses on the essential mods that define the Indus aesthetic.

Enjoy **Minecraft Transit Railway** for advanced transport systems, **Paladin’s Furniture** and **Modern Decorations** for detailed interiors, **Immersive Paintings** and **Slideshow** for in-game PNG/GIF displays, and **Biomes O’ Plenty + Tectonic** for natural, believable world generation. For builders, **Axiom** and **Effortless Structures** provide advanced tools to help you create and shape your world more efficiently. Select performance mods are included to help keep gameplay responsive.

This pack has been fully tested with **Complementary Shaders**, which work seamlessly alongside Minecraft Transit Railway and enhance the overall visual realism of your Minecraft world.

**Important**

- This modpack is **not compatible** with the _Indus Metropolis_ world download.
- For the best performance, it is **strongly recommended to allocate at least 6GB+ of RAM** in your launcher settings.
